mapper.select: SELECT id , walking_path_title AS walkingPathTitle , image_exposure AS imageExposure , walking_path_start AS walkingPathStart , walking_path_end AS walkingPathEnd , walking_total_time AS walkingTotalTime , walking_count AS walkingCount , walking_distance AS walkingDistance , walking_kcal AS walkingKcal , rest_time AS restTime , walking_path_start_name AS walkingPathStartName , walking_path_end_name AS walkingPathEndName , create_datetime AS createDatetime , update_datetime AS updateDatetime , delete_datetime AS deleteDatetime , is_deleted AS isDelete FROM walking_path where id = #{walkingPathId}
